chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-6732 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection No.16 2. For order on Misc. No.28758/2020 (Exemption) 3. For order on Misc. No.28759/2020 (Stay) 4. For order on Misc. No.28760/2020 (Inspection) 5. For hearing of main case 30.10.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2020, which is almost five years ago. It was first taken up on 01.3.2021, which is over four years ago, when a counsel held brief for learned counsel for the petitioner. In the last five years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently. Today, once again, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation despite his name appearing in the cause list and despite lapse of five years. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
